doc: Play any pitch; hear the nearest scale tone (ADR-0032). External absolute notes at /snap/notes [midi, vel] are quantized to the tonal context by a snap operator, which emits scale degrees into the Voicer (the 'always in key' good-button); each note plays on a hosted `autotune-voice` sub-patch. Set the key/scale on /harmony/root, /harmony/s0../harmony/s6, /harmony/degrees; set snap behaviour with /snap/target (0 Scale, 1 Chord, 2 ChordThenScale) and /snap/direction (0 Nearest, 1 Up, 2 Down). Both the snap and the Voicer read the same context, so changing key re-tunes held notes live.

nodes.doc: Degrees -> Hz via the tonal context, played on hosted autotune-voice sub-patches.
